overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Zero Dawn showing the protagonist Aloy walking along a mountain trail through rocky terrain and grassy hills. The character passes a lit torch post and wooden settlement structures while moving toward distant snow-capped mountains under clear morning skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain trail with lit torch post

events.description: character passes the lit stone torch post on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path away from the torch post toward the open landscape

entered.detail: tall stone pillar with a burning flame on top
tall evergreen trees in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the character standing near a lit stone torch post on a dirt mountain trail. As she walks forward, she passes the torch and moves along a path bordered by a large red rock formation on the right and purple foliage on the left, with pine trees visible in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain vista with distant peaks

events.description: landscape opens up to reveal snow-capped mountains in the distance
wooden fence posts and barricades come into view on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding trail while taking in the expansive mountain views

entered.detail: tall tree with spreading branches on the right side of path
massive mountain range with snow visible on the peaks
vertical wooden posts marking a boundary line

segments.scene_description: The trail opens into a wide vista revealing distant snow-capped mountains under a bright morning sky. The character walks past a large deciduous tree on the right as wooden fence posts begin to appear on the left, indicating an approaching settlement or camp area.

events.description: passing through broken wooden fence line into settlement perimeter

agents.ego_description: walking past wooden barricades and fences toward distant settlement structures

entered.detail: wooden structures and tents indicating a small camp or village
damaged and weathered wooden fence sections
large rocks scattered across the grassy terrain

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a perimeter marked by broken wooden barricades and fence posts, approaching a settlement camp visible in the distance. The terrain becomes more open with scattered boulders and sparse grass as the trail continues toward the wooden structures of the camp.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail that transitions from a narrow, rocky path into an open vista leading toward a remote settlement. It begins with the character passing a lit stone torch post on a dirt trail, flanked by a large red rock formation and purple foliage. As the path opens up, the view expands to reveal distant snow-capped mountains under a bright morning sky, while the camera passes a large deciduous tree. The scene then shifts toward a perimeter of broken wooden barricades and fence posts, signaling the approach of a camp. Finally, the terrain becomes more open with scattered boulders and sparse grass as the character moves steadily toward the wooden structures of the settlement in the distance.
